bird.name: Fernwren
bird.summary: The fernwren (Oreoscopus gutturalis) is a species of bird in the family Acanthizidae. It is monotypic within the genus Oreoscopus.

locations.name: Paluma Range National Park
locations.summary: Paluma Range is a national park located between Ingham and Townsville, in north Queensland, Australia.

locations.name: Tully Gorge National Park
locations.summary: Tully Gorge is a national park in Far North Queensland, Australia, 1,338 km northwest of Brisbane.

locations.name: Cape Tribulation, Queensland
locations.summary: Cape Tribulation (Kuku-Yalanji: Kulki) is a headland and coastal locality in the Shire of Douglas in northern Queenslan…

locations.id: loc-國際自然保護聯盟瀕危物種紅色名錄-ddaff039
locations.name: 國際自然保護聯盟瀕危物種紅色名錄
locations.summary: 國際自然保護聯盟瀕危物種紅色名錄（或稱IUCN紅色名錄，簡稱紅皮書）於1963年開始編製，是全球動植物物種保護現狀最全面的名錄。此名錄由國際自然保護聯盟編製及維護。 IUCN紅色名錄是根據嚴格準則去評估數以千計物種及亞種的絕種風險所編製而…

relations.subject: Fernwren
relations.evidence: The fernwren is found in northeast Queensland rainforest between above sea-level, although more often above . It is found in the Paluma Range, near Townsville, and from the Tully Gorge National Park northwards to Cape Tribulation. It is sedentary and classified as endangered on the IUCN Red List
